name: Rocks
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugar until smooth.
2. Add eggs to the mixture and beat thoroughly.
3. In a separate bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and cloves.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture alternately with sour milk, mixing well after each addition.
5. Stir in the chopped nuts and dried fruit until evenly distributed.
6. Drop spoonfuls of the batter onto a greased baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for about 12 minutes, or until golden brown and firm to the touch.
